zh.Of, Pitburg, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾皮特盧格
zh.Pitlurg, Lanark, Scot: 英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾皮特盧格
zh.Peebles, Peebles-shire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭皮布萊爾皮布萊斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Gordon於大約1410年出生在蘇格蘭時，她的父親John Gordon of Scurdargue37歲，母親Elizabeth Maitland31歲。她於1434年與Sir Gavin Baird of Posso在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾皮布萊斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1500年在她的家鄉享年92歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Of, Pitburg, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾皮特盧格
zh-hans.Pitlurg, Lanark, Scot: 英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾皮特盧格
zh-hans.Peebles, Peebles-shire, Scotland: 苏格兰皮布萊爾皮布萊斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Gordon于大约1410年出生在苏格兰时，她的父亲John Gordon of Scurdargue37岁，母亲Elizabeth Maitland31岁。她于1434年与Sir Gavin Baird of Posso在苏格兰皮布萊爾皮布萊斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1500年在她的家乡享年92岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Gordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Gordon was born about 1410, in Scotland, her father, John Gordon of Scurdargue, was 37 and her mother, Elizabeth Maitland, was 31. She married Sir Gavin Baird of Posso in 1434, in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1500, in her hometown, at the age of 92, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Gordon est née environ 1410, à Écosse, son père, John Gordon of Scurdargue, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Maitland, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Gavin Baird of Posso en 1434, à Peebles, Valle de Twede, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1500, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Gordon um 1410 in Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Gordon of Scurdargue 37 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Maitland 31. Sie hat 1434 in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland Sir Gavin Baird of Posso geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1500 im Alter von 92 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Gordon è nata il circa 1410 nel Scotland, sua padre, John Gordon of Scurdargue, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Maitland, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir Gavin Baird of Posso nel 1434, nel Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1500, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 92 anni, e fu sepolta a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.Scotland, United Kingdom: イギリススコットランド
ja.Aberdeenshire, Scotland: スコットランドアバーディーンシュアイア

ja.Pitlurg, Lanark, Scot: イギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアピトルルグ
ja.Peebles, Peebles-shire, Scotland: スコットランドペエブレシュアイアペエブレス
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gordonが約1410年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父John Gordon of Scurdargueは37歳，母Elizabeth Maitlandは31歳であった。1434年にスコットランドペエブレシュアイアペエブレスでSir Gavin Baird of Possoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1500年に故郷で92歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gordon(이)가 대략 1410년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Gordon of Scurdargue(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Maitland(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1434년 스컷랜드 피블레실르 피블레스에서 Sir Gavin Baird of Posso(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1500년 그녀의 고향에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1410–about 1500: tany ho any amin'ny 1410–tany ho any amin'ny 1500

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Gordon nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Scotland, seu pai, John Gordon of Scurdargue, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Maitland, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Gavin Baird of Posso em 1434, em Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1500, em sua cidade natal, com 92 anos, e foi sepultada em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Gordon родилась около 1410 г. в местности Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Gordon of Scurdargue было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Maitland, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Gavin Baird of Posso в 1434 г. в местности пиблесь, пиблессхир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1500 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 92 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1410–about 1500: e tusa o le 1410–e tusa o le 1500

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Gordon nació aproximadamente 1410, en Scotland, su papá, John Gordon of Scurdargue, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Maitland, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir Gavin Baird of Posso en 1434, en Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1500, en su pueblo, a la edad de 92 años, y fue sepultada en Escocia, Reino Unido.
